landing.heroSubtext: Not every opportunity announces itself. The most consequential connections form quietly among operators who recognise each other, trust each other, and create together. Balea Sphere is that room.
landing.manifestoQuote: A small, high-trust circle always outperforms a large, noisy network.
landing.pillar1Text: Every member is assessed for genuine relevance to the Balearic ecosystem. There is no shortcut to entry.
landing.pillar2Text: A focused circle of high-trust operators creates more value than any open network. Quality is enforced, not hoped for.
landing.pillar3Text: Credits ensure every introduction carries weight. Low-effort contact has no currency here. Each connection is an investment.
landing.vipSubtext: VIP membership is not a label — it is an operating advantage. Automatically granted when your verified annual revenue exceeds €1 million, it unlocks capabilities that turn the network into a private deal engine, a curated pitch funnel, and a trusted intelligence layer.
landing.pitchText1: Spend 25 credits to send a structured pitch to any VIP member. They decide on their own timeline. If they accept — a private thread opens automatically.
landing.pitchText2: VIPs earn credits for every accepted pitch. The circle rewards engagement, not just status.
landing.roomsText1: Private rooms where senior members share intelligence, co-structure deals, and discuss what cannot be said in open networks.
landing.roomsText2: Room access requires the correct access level. Some rooms are hidden until unlocked.
landing.vipBenefit1Text: VIP members receive curated off-market deal introductions — real estate, venture, and hospitality opportunities that never surface publicly.
landing.vipBenefit2Text: Ambitious founders and operators pay credits to pitch to you. Review on your schedule. Accept to earn credits. Decline with one tap.
landing.vipBenefit3Text: Access invite-only conversation rooms for senior operators. Share intelligence. Co-create. Discuss what cannot be said in open networks.
landing.vipBenefit4Text: Your listing appears first in marketplace searches. VIP nodes pulse gold in the network map. Your profile signals authority from the first impression.
landing.vipBenefit5Text: VIP status multiplies your trust score. Every introduction, every listing, every pitch carries the weight of verified, serious operating history.
landing.vipBenefit6Text: Connect with the people who actually move real estate, hospitality, and capital across Mallorca, Ibiza, and Menorca — privately.
landing.sectionWorkspaceText: Secure command centre. Every signal, every conversation, every opportunity in one place.
landing.sectionNetworkText: A living signal map. Discover members by company and sector. Unlock introductions with intention.
landing.sectionMessagesText: Direct, intentional conversations. Initiated from the Network Map. No noise. No unsolicited contact.
landing.sectionMarketplaceText: Off-market opportunities, strategic partnerships, and private access. Visible only to verified members.
landing.sectionPitchesText: Pitch directly to VIP investors and operators. Each pitch is reviewed personally — no cold emails.
landing.sectionApplyText: Access is curated, not purchased. Share your profile — we assess fit within 48 hours.

applyForm.criteria1Text: You operate, invest, or create within the Mallorca, Ibiza, or Menorca ecosystem — not as a tourist, but as a builder.
applyForm.criteria2Text: You bring something specific and rare: expertise, capital, relationships, or opportunity that the circle cannot easily find elsewhere.
applyForm.criteria3Text: You seek meaningful collaboration, not exposure. Every introduction you make reflects on those who introduced you.
applyForm.formNote: Specific, honest answers significantly increase approval speed. Generic applications are typically deferred. Your information is handled confidentially and shared only with the curation team.
applyForm.revenueNote: Revenue figures are strictly confidential and never shared with other members. We reserve the right to verify declared figures internally as part of our curation process.
applyForm.questionOffer: What value do you bring to this circle?
applyForm.questionOfferPlaceholder: Describe your strongest and most specific contribution. Name sectors, deal types, relationships, or expertise. Be concrete — what can members gain from you that they cannot find elsewhere?
applyForm.questionSeekPlaceholder: Describe your concrete current goals. Are you sourcing capital, partners, properties, operators, or strategic introductions? Precision matters here.
applyForm.questionWhy: Why are you a strong fit for this private network?
applyForm.questionWhyPlaceholder: Explain your Balearic connection, track record, and why collaboration with you is relevant to a curated membership circle. Reference specific projects, relationships, or outcomes if possible.
applyForm.referralHint: If an existing member referred you, enter their email or referral code here.
applyForm.consentText: I agree that Balea Sphere stores and processes my personal data for membership administration and network facilitation purposes, in accordance with the Privacy & Data Protection Policy. I understand I can request deletion of my data at any time via my account settings.
applyForm.consentError: Please agree to the data processing terms to submit your application.
applyForm.submitNote: Applications are reviewed within 24–48 hours. You will receive a direct response by email.
applyForm.successReviewNote: Our curation team reviews all applications within 24–48 hours. You will receive a decision by email.
applyForm.checkEmailBody: We have sent a confirmation to your email address. Our team will be in touch within 24–48 hours.
applyForm.checkSpamHint: Can't find it? Check your spam or junk folder — our emails occasionally land there.

credits.referralSubtext: Share your unique referral link with trusted operators. When they join and get verified, you both earn credits — no cap, no expiry.
credits.signInForLink: Sign in from Workspace to get your personal referral link.
credits.step1Desc: Send your unique referral link to trusted founders, operators, and investors in the Balearics.
credits.step2Desc: Your referral submits their application. Once verified and approved, the reward triggers automatically.
credits.step3Desc: You earn 20 cr (or 40 cr if you're VIP). They receive a 10 cr welcome bonus. No cap, no expiry.
credits.creditsSubtext: Credits are not a paywall. They are a deliberate quality filter that keeps every introduction, conversation, and opportunity high-signal and high-trust. You spend only when you choose to unlock something of real value.
credits.plannerSubtext: Slide to match your expected monthly activity. We recommend the most suitable plan in real time.
credits.phil1Text: Credits prevent low-effort outreach. Every action carries weight, which raises the quality of every interaction in the circle.
credits.phil2Text: You spend when you choose to unlock a specific, high-value move. Not by default, not by accident.
credits.phil3Text: Members who invest intentionally build stronger reputations. The credit system amplifies the signal of serious operators.
credits.signInForHistory: Sign in from Workspace to see your live credit history.
credits.noTransactions: No transactions yet. Your welcome credits will appear here.
credits.planStarterAudience: Ideal for new members finding their footing in the circle.
credits.planGrowthAudience: Best for members with consistent weekly engagement.
credits.planCircleAudience: For serious operators running multiple strategic tracks simultaneously.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Curated gatherings for the Balearic circle.
events.subtext: Exclusive events for verified members across Mallorca, Ibiza, and Menorca.
events.signInToRegister: Sign in to register for events.
events.errorLoadingEvents: Could not load events. Please try again.

aiConcierge.inputPlaceholder: How can I help you today?
aiConcierge.signInRequired: Sign in to use the AI Concierge.
aiConcierge.insufficientCredits: Insufficient credits. Top up to continue.
aiConcierge.welcomeMessage: Welcome to the Balea Sphere AI Concierge. How can I assist you today?
